_meta.name: Adawaty — Entity & Proof Map
_meta.purpose: Cite-worthy facts and named methodologies for consistent site-wide injection.
rules: Attach evidence_url when a public page exists.

methodologies.name: Brand → Build → Demand
methodologies.one_liner: A delivery model that ships brand clarity first, then a conversion-ready build, then demand and visibility systems.

methodologies.name: Scope-Lock Sprint
methodologies.one_liner: A fixed-scope, timeboxed sprint with measurable outcomes and explicit non-goals.
claims: Reduces scope creep by defining non-goals

methodologies.name: One Primary Action UI
methodologies.one_liner: A UX rule: each screen should optimize for one primary user action to reduce cognitive load and drop-offs.

methodologies.name: Citation-First SEO
methodologies.one_liner: An SEO/AEO approach that structures pages for extraction: clear entities, definitions, and FAQ blocks to improve citations in AI answers.

proof_points.label: Registered address
proof_points.statement: Adawaty’s registered address is in Sheridan, Wyoming, United States (30 N Gould St Suite R, 82801).

proof_points.label: Trading address
proof_points.statement: Adawaty has a trading address in Bratislava, Slovakia (Ivánska cesta 30/D, Aircraft Building, 821 04).

proof_points.label: ISO-ready delivery
proof_points.statement: Adawaty uses documented delivery checklists and handover docs designed for ISO-aligned governance requirements.
proof_points.notes: If you publish a dedicated process page, point evidence_url there for stronger verifiability.

proof_points.label: Analytics & event tracking as standard
proof_points.statement: DFY Website and App Development deliverables include analytics/event tracking to measure activation, conversion, and drop-offs.

proof_points.label: Dedicated AI visibility audit
proof_points.statement: Adawaty provides an AI Visibility Audit page with page-specific canonical + structured data injection.

brand_build_demand.long: Brand → Build → Demand: clarify positioning, ship a conversion-ready build, then scale demand and AI visibility.

ai_visibility_definition.long: AI Visibility combines SEO, AEO, and LLMSEO to increase citations and presence in Google AI Overviews and AI assistants.
